/usr/bin/ar qc libcomm_core.a CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/callback_queue.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/channel_factory.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/image_pipeline.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/module_base.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/payload_codec.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/refcounted_message_store.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/reliability.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/shm_bus_control_plane.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/shm_bus_runtime_prefork.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/shm_ring_buffer.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/shm_segment.o CMakeFiles/comm_core.dir/src/shm_bus_runtime.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcomm_core.a
